endorsements.name: Mark Gundrum
endorsements.title: Wisconsin Court of Appeals Judge, District II
endorsements.quote: Paul and I have been close friends for 20 years. With his experience as a longtime prosecutor, he's the one I trust to keep my family—and all of our families in Waukesha County—safe.

endorsements.name: Shelley A. Grogan
endorsements.title: Wisconsin Court of Appeals Judge, District II
endorsements.quote: I wholeheartedly endorse Paul Dedinsky for Waukesha County Circuit Court. He is a principled conservative who has demonstrated that he will apply the law as written; support our Constitutions; and faithfully guard against encroachment of our liberties. He has my full support.

endorsements.name: Maria Lazar
endorsements.title: Wisconsin Court of Appeals Judge, District II
endorsements.quote: Now, more than ever, we need judges who not only respect the law, but who stand up for everyone's rights and freedoms. Paul Dedinsky will bring the perfect blend of constitutionalism, compassion, and justice to Waukesha's bench.

endorsements.name: Anthony LoCoco
endorsements.title: Court of Appeals Judge, District II
endorsements.quote: I could not be more excited to endorse former Governor Walker-appointed judge and career prosecutor, Paul Dedinsky, for the Waukesha County bench. Paul is well known to so many of us precisely because he has already devoted his life's work to making Wisconsin a safer place for our families. I also know him to be a person of deep faith and true integrity. He is the perfect match for this important position.
